title: Add humanTree root history buffer matching agentTree's 30-root buffer

artifacts.description: Add uint256[30] humanRootHistory ring-buffer, humanRootHistoryIndex pointer, _pushHumanRoot() internal helper, and update verifyHandshake() to check humanRootHistory instead of single humanRoot

Foundry tests: (1) enroll 31 humans and assert all 30 most-recent roots are valid, oldest is evicted; (2) proof with stale root beyond buffer fails; (3) concurrent enrollment + verify under ring-buffer wrap-around
Document liveness requirement, buffer-depth rationale (30 slots @ ~15s prove time = 7.5 min window), and invariants the contract upholds

steps: Read current IdentityRegistry.sol to locate agentRootHistory declaration and _pushAgentRoot() ring-buffer logic as the reference implementation
Declare parallel storage: `uint256[30] public humanRootHistory` and `uint256 public humanRootHistoryIndex` immediately after the agentTree equivalents
Add `_pushHumanRoot(uint256 newRoot)` internal function mirroring _pushAgentRoot(): store newRoot at humanRootHistory[humanRootHistoryIndex % 30], increment index
Replace bare `humanRoot = newRoot` assignment in the human enrollment function with a call to `_pushHumanRoot(newRoot)` and keep the canonical `humanRoot` field updated for backward-compatible reads
Update verifyHandshake(): replace `require(humanRoot == proof.humanRoot)` with a loop over humanRootHistory checking any slot matches proof.humanRoot (same pattern as agentTree check)
Add a view helper `isValidHumanRoot(uint256 root) returns (bool)` for off-chain SDK and relayer use
Write Foundry tests covering: normal buffer fill, ring-buffer wrap at index 30, proof valid against slot N-29, proof rejected for slot N-30 (evicted), and zero-value slot guard on fresh deploy
Run `forge test --match-contract IdentityRegistryHumanRootHistory` and confirm all pass
Update SDK root-fetching logic to call isValidHumanRoot() before submitting proofs, and surface a retry hint when the root has just been evicted
Update docs/specs/human-root-history.md with invariants, buffer depth rationale, and migration note (no circuit changes required)
dependencies: IdentityRegistry.sol — existing agentRootHistory ring-buffer implementation (reference pattern)
verifyHandshake() — root equality check to be replaced with buffer scan
Foundry test suite — existing test harness for IdentityRegistry
Off-chain SDK proof submission path — needs isValidHumanRoot() call before submit
